SIUP = Surat Izin Usaha Perdagangan

-Micro SIUP shall be owned by companies with net assets amounting less than 50 million rupiah, excluding land and building location of the business. The company must also be a sole proprietorship or partnership and the business activities are managed, operated, or maintained by its owner or family members/close relatives.
-Small SIUP shall be owned by companies with net assets amounting more than 50 million rupiah up to 500 million rupiah, excluding land and building location of the business.
-Medium SIUP shall be owned by companies with net assets amounting between 500 million rupiah up to 10 billion rupiah, excluding land and building location of the business.
-Large SIUP shall be owned by companies with net assets amounting more than 10 billion rupiah excluding land and building location of the business.
What is your company's business license (SIUP) classification?
Companies with more than 10 employees or more than 1 million rupiah in monthly payroll must register with the Ministry of Manpower.
Is your company registered with the Ministry of Manpower?

BPJS = Badan Penyelenggara Jaminan Sosial\r\n

\r\nCompanies with more than 10 employees or more than 1 million rupiah in monthly payroll must register for Social Security (BPJS).
